GLM4+ models return answer in a specific format "<\|begin_of_box\|>some_answer<\|end_of_box\|>" which cannot be easily recognized by current SGLang mmmu

sglang.title: Minor code style fix for dllm
sglang.author: hnyls2002
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Some rules:

Specific code path with multiple lines should be split into a function
Put less parameters inside __init__ as few as possible.
Do not use getattr as much as possible.
Only use a if condition else b in a very simple and clear case.

sglang.title: fix: creating blobs only once for publish trace retries
sglang.author: dougyster
sglang.bodyExcerpt:
Motivation
On intermittent failures to publish traces, there could be big delays because we create the same set of blobs for every time create_tree fails. This pr creates blobs just once before entering the retryable loop, so that if create tree fails, we don't recreate the same blobs.

vllm.title: [bug] Fix "Current vLLM config is not set." warnings when FlashInfer attention is used
vllm.author: nvpohanh
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
VLLM config is set only during initialization stage, not during runtime stage. Therefore, we should not call get_current_vllm_config() during dunrime stage. Instead, cache the config we want during initialization stage and reuse it during runtime stage.
This was caused by #26315 by @MatthewB

This broke our CI: https://buildkite.com/vllm/ci/builds/42316#019af4e7-10fb-4e87-9688-03e2c35fbbca
I've separately opened #30197 to insulate from this in future.

adjusting --gpu-memory-utilization

vllm.title: Add more docs for regex
vllm.author: xu-song
vllm.bodyExcerpt:
Purpose
rust style regex is a bit different from python regex. For example, ^(?!abc) is not supported in rust regex.

vllm.bodyExcerpt: This pull request adds a safeguard to the grouped_topk function in fused_moe.py to ensure correct behavior when the number of experts does not meet the requirements for grouped top-k computation.
